swarm.description: Default OpenFlo agent — orchestrates sub-agents for complex multi-step tasks

implementer.description: Implementation specialist — writes production code from architectural plans, follows project conventions

architect.description: Designs software architecture — creates plans, component diagrams, data flow, and tech decisions

reviewer.description: Reviews code for bugs, security, style, and performance issues

tester.description: Generates and runs tests — unit, integration, e2e — finds coverage gaps

security.description: Vulnerability audit — scans for security issues in code and dependencies

debugger.description: Root cause analysis — debugs test failures, crashes, and production bugs

refactorer.description: Code restructuring — eliminates duplication, simplifies long functions, improves organization

documenter.description: Documentation — writes README, JSDoc, API docs, ADRs, and inline comments

researcher.description: Codebase exploration — quickly finds files, searches code, and answers how-things-work questions

devops.description: DevOps — CI/CD pipelines, Docker, deployment, infrastructure-as-code

perf.description: Performance — identifies bottlenecks, optimizes code, reduces load times

migrator.description: Migration — handles codebase migrations, framework upgrades, breaking changes

deps.description: Dependencies — manages packages, audits vulnerabilities, updates, resolves conflicts

i18n.description: Internationalization — adds i18n/l10n, extracts strings, manages translations

legal.description: Legal — audits license compliance, checks dependency licenses, open-source compatibility

ux.description: UX — reviews user experience, accessibility (WCAG), usability, and consistency

goal.description: Goal Planning — decomposes goals, tracks progress, suggests next actions

consensus.description: Consensus — manages multi-agent voting and decision resolution
